demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My back and hips are locked in agonizing pain, I haven't slept in days, and I cannot manage to walk to the kitchen.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain flared up badly after I overdid it yesterday and now I'm stuck in my chair and can't get to the bathroom or make a cup of tea. My usual paracetamol and anti-inflammatories aren't touching it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the pain has been there for more than three years, but it flared up badly yesterday after some minor exertion
symptom_narrative.duration: chronic (over three years) with an acute worsening over the past week
symptom_narrative.character: deep, constant aching in the lower back and both hips, far worse than the small injury that first started it
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonising right now, the worst it has been, and nothing is helping
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse over the last week, unbearable today
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing at the moment; the usual tablets aren't working anymore
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, and it flared after doing a bit too much yesterday
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe insomnia and no restful sleep for days, feeling completely exhausted and drained, very tearful and on edge and irritable, and I've stopped doing the things I used to do
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: flare-ups of this chronic pain before, but never this bad or this disabling
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot rise from the lounge chair without extreme distress, cannot safely walk to the kitchen or bathroom, normally gets around with a walking stick

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing back and hip pain for over three years
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: more than three years ago after a minor injury
past_medical_history.how_managed: regular paracetamol and anti-inflammatory tablets, and a walking stick

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the house is a bit of a mess and the walking stick and other things are out of reach from the chair; no one else is at home to help right now

communication_style.typical_message_style: tearful and anxious, focused on how unbearable the pain and being stuck have become

objective_data_offered.value: sitting rigidly in the chair, grimacing and wincing with the smallest movement, visibly distressed and tearful
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression over a video call, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: unable to stand up out of the chair without extreme distress; walking stick and belongings out of reach
hasn't slept properly in several days and feels completely drained
